introSection: Vilda Musen was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Stockholm, Sweden. In Sweden, Vilda Musen means "Wild Mouse". The roller coaster was removed in order to dismantle Jetline and will be replaced by the nearly identical Vildare Musen in 2027.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Vilda Musen was a Bobsled Coaster installation from Gerstlauer. It was long and was  tall making it the worlds tallest wild mouse roller coaster on opening. It has since been overtaken by the 24 metre tall Gesengte Sau at Wiener Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria.

fullText:
Vilda Musen was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Stockholm, Sweden. In Sweden, Vilda Musen means "Wild Mouse". The roller coaster was removed in order to dismantle Jetline and will be replaced by the nearly identical Vildare Musen in 2027.

Vilda Musen was a Bobsled Coaster installation from Gerstlauer. It was long and was  tall making it the worlds tallest wild mouse roller coaster on opening. It has since been overtaken by the 24 metre tall Gesengte Sau at Wiener Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria.
